title: write_vol must embed vol.provenance receipt as NIfTI comment extension by default (S19 PAIN-4)
description:
ni.write_vol(vol, path) constructs nib.Nifti1Image(data, vol.trans) and saves with no extensions, silently dropping any vol.provenance Receipt. vol.to_nibabel() does the right thing (S05 PAIN-6 closure) — but write_vol is the curated public writer named in MISSION, so the documented happy path violates 'structural provenance by default' (decision rule #4) and the 0.3 milestone gate that 'provenance survives the write/read boundary where supported.'

Both Claude (claude-s04-landed) and Codex (codex-s19-review) reviewers on the pain-points-from-scenarios board independently flagged this as the urgent/highest-priority item — Codex argued for P0 explicitly, Claude argued for landing it before any group-reducer work because it protects every existing derived-map workflow, not just S19.

Repro: tests/test_s19_group_mean_template_tsnr.py::test_write_vol_embeds_receipt_into_nifti is a strict xfail today; it flips to XPASS the moment write_vol embeds.

Fix shape: route NeuroVol inputs with a populated .provenance through vol.to_nibabel() inside write_vol before nib.save. read_image already silently ignores foreign comment extensions, so no back-compat risk on the read side.

Acceptance:
1. test_s19_group_mean_template_tsnr::test_write_vol_embeds_receipt_into_nifti goes from xfail-strict to plain pass (remove the marker).
2. test_s05_receipt_io_boundary still passes.
3. Add a regression test that asserts write_vol(vol, path) + read_image(path) preserves vol.provenance.method_name.

Board posts: post-01KRMRQKXGW4MFARVQE86EGWRF (filing), post-01KRMRSDTBXXNM2JKJ8JCG8Q1C (claude-s04-landed review), post-01KRMRSH6AJXZTER8GBNJRDCMQ (codex-s19-review review).

title: Port parity bug hunt: neuroim2 parity sweep
description: Added user-facing parent_grid property on ROIVolWindow/ROIVecWindow to avoid raw parent_index flat-index assumptions; updated searchlight/ROI tests to use parent_grid. searchlight high-level already writes results via parent_grid conversion to preserve opaque parent_index contract.
notes:
Started party kickoff via Agent Mail: notified BlueFalcon (bug hunt) and RedFalcon (test creation); seeded checkpoints issued.
Aligned with broader team thread #9. Expanded recipients now include GoldLake, IvoryMeadow, JadeWaterfall, TealBadger, SapphireRiver, GentleFox, CopperPond; requesting [issue,path,input,expected,actual] plus confidence tags.
Sent additional checkpoint reminder in parity thread #9 to BlueFalcon/RedFalcon/CopperPond: report (A) confirmed mismatch tuples or (B) lane coverage + no issues; cadence every 2h.,
23:06 checkpoint: no concrete mismatches reported by incoming loop yet; multiple agents (via thread) request coverage/no-issue summaries. Instructed lanes to report thread#9 (A) issue/path/input/expected/actual mismatch tuples or (B) module coverage + no-issue + next module.
23:06:35 direct status pings sent to BlueFalcon (bug findings) and RedFalcon (test plan), plus coordination close-loop to CopperPond/SapphireRiver. Awaiting responses in thread 9 and direct inbox.
23:07: received consolidated thread update: still zero confirmed mismatches. Issued final checkpoint request (30+ minute hold window) asking A) confirmed tuple with fix-test or B) module no-issue + next target; instructed de-scope/reassign after two silent windows.

title: Add orientation/affine utility functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: affine_to_orientation(), affine_to_axcodes(), axcodes_to_orientation(), apply_orientation(), orientation_inverse_affine(), obliquity(), vox2out_vox(), perm_mat(), rescale_affine(). These are core spatial operations.

title: Phase 4: verify wheel + tag alpha
description: Full pytest + examples/scenarios green. Build wheel, assert top_level.txt is neuroim only and no neuroimpy/pyneuroim/examples/fixtures. Smoke-test fresh install + import. Tag 0.3.0a1.

title: Phase 3: release hygiene + Python 3.10 floor
description: Add LICENSE (MIT) + CHANGELOG.md. Real author email. version=0.3.0a1 in pyproject + src/neuroim/__init__.py (single source via importlib.metadata if feasible). requires-python>=3.10; black target py310; mypy python_version 3.10; drop 3.8/3.9 classifiers; remove from __future__ import annotations + Optional/Union/Tuple cruft. Add [tool.ruff] config (ignore __init__ F401), fix ~20 real lint issues incl box_blur F811 redefinition in spatial_filters.py:434. Modernize dep floors (numpy>=1.24 scipy>=1.10 sklearn>=1.2 nibabel>=4.0 matplotlib>=3.6 h5py>=3.7).

title: Phase 2: de-R-ify public API (breaking, pre-alpha)
description: Remove ~12 snake-case constructor aliases (neurospace/neurovol/neurovec/neurovecseq/neuroslice/slices/roicoords/roivol/big_neurovecseq/file_backed_neurovec/mapped_neurovecseq) and the NeuroHyperVec function-shadows-class from __init__.py top-level (classes stay; R names live in compat). Collapse readers to read_volume/read_series keyword-only; read_vol/read_vec/read_image/read_vol_list/load_data out of public surface. Delete return_legacy params + bare-ndarray paths. Demote cgb_*/indexing/stats internals. Rewrite __all__ to ~34 names. Delete misleading __dir__() override.

title: Phase 1: demolish shim/packaging cruft (pre-alpha)
description: Delete src/neuroimpy, src/pyneuroim, src/examples, src/fixtures (move fixtures to tests/fixtures, fix ~20 test imports + examples/draw_audit import). Delete tests/test_install_aliases.py, tests/test_package_roots.py, tests/test_compat_api.py::test_legacy_package_aliases_import_primary_api, pyproject [tool.neuroim.deprecated-package-names]. Strip _DEPRECATED_COMPAT_ALIASES/__getattr__ branch in __init__.py (keep atlas lazy import). Delete archive/, CLAUDE.md.bak, docs/_archive/. Add include=[neuroim*] to setuptools packages.find. Verify wheel top_level.txt == neuroim only.

title: Pre-alpha cleanup: ship neuroim 0.3.0a1 without legacy/cruft
description: Remove shim/packaging/naming debt wrapped around clean library code before the first alpha. Decisions locked: public readers = read_volume/read_series (read_vol/read_vec -> compat only), version = 0.3.0a1, Python floor = 3.10+. Library code itself is clean (0 TODO/FIXME, green tests, strong 23-scenario evidence suite); scope is the shim/packaging/unpythonic-API layer only.

title: docs: fix A1 falsifiable claim — ClusteredNeuroVec listed as NeuroVec subtype
description: Pre-commit review (post-01KRNYHVDNN2HPES2S3DV7CM2W) found concepts/images.qmd lists ClusteredNeuroVec as a NeuroVec storage strategy under an 'is a / MRO' invariant, but issubclass(ClusteredNeuroVec, NeuroVec) is False (bare class) and it is not structurally a VoxelSeriesStore either. Apply option (a): drop from NeuroVec storage list, describe separately as parcel-typed container. Also address A2 import-path clarity for VoxelSeriesStore.

title: Add ni.group_mean (or ni.mean_volumes) reducer over typed 3-D maps with N-way same-space gate (S19 PAIN-1+2)
description:
Combined consensus ticket for PAIN-1 (no first-class group reducer) and PAIN-2 (N-way same-space gate is hand-rolled in user code).

Motivation: S19 (group-mean tSNR across subjects in template space) is the first scenario whose input is N typed 3-D maps and whose output is one map with N upstream chains. Today every multi-subject scenario hand-rolls np.stack + np.mean + a same-space loop + a Receipt.merge fold. ni.concat is 4-D NeuroVec only, so it cannot be the answer.

Both reviewers (claude-s04-landed, codex-s19-review) on pain-points-from-scenarios converged on landing PAIN-1 and PAIN-2 together as one small reducer, NOT a modeling framework. PAIN-3 (the multi-input Receipt helper) stays internal — implement to remove duplication, but do not add to neuroim.results.__all__ until a second reducer needs it.

API shape (boring name preferred):
  ni.group_mean(*maps) -> DenseNeuroVol
or
  ni.mean_volumes(maps) -> DenseNeuroVol

Acceptance:
1. Asserts same-space across all inputs at the entry (closes PAIN-2). Implementation can use a private verify._assert_same_space_all helper; do not export publicly.
2. Stacks data along a synthetic axis and reduces to a DenseNeuroVol on the shared space.
3. Builds a Receipt via receipt_for(... params=GroupReduceParams(method_name='group_mean', n_inputs=len(maps))) and folds every upstream Receipt into it through an internal merge_receipts helper (the PAIN-3 plumbing).
4. The terminal receipt method_name reads as a single inspectable summary like 'resample_vec(...)+temporal_snr+group_mean(n=N)' — NOT a verbatim concatenation of every per-subject chain (per claude-s04-landed's design caution: keep it readable).
5. tests/test_s19_group_mean_template_tsnr.py::test_group_mean_is_in_public_api and ::test_concat_can_stack_3d_volumes_into_vector go from xfail-strict to plain pass (drop the xfail markers, replace the hand-rolled rewrite call with the new public API).
6. The hand-rolled group_mean_volumes in examples/scenarios/19_group_mean_template_tsnr/neuroim_version.py collapses to one line.

Out of scope (explicit):
- General group statistics layer (median, weighted mean, mixed-effects). Defer.
- Public verify.assert_same_space_all. Stays private until a second caller proves the need.
- Public merge_receipts in neuroim.results.__all__. Stays internal until a second reducer or user code needs it.

Depends on: neuroim-python-ur0 (PAIN-4) should land first per reviewer consensus, because the round-trip test for the new reducer relies on write_vol embedding receipts.

Board posts: post-01KRMRNREZ4K4PFBHNBVS0SR8Y (filing PAIN-1), post-01KRMRPFJP6FG5T3J7QXS26J5M (filing PAIN-2), post-01KRMRSDTBXXNM2JKJ8JCG8Q1C (claude-s04-landed review), post-01KRMRSH6AJXZTER8GBNJRDCMQ (codex-s19-review review).

title: AFNI header read_meta_info should reject malformed DATASET_DIMENSIONS and missing BRICK_TYPES
AFNI read_meta_info requires valid IJK_TO_DICOM
description: Python currently accepted AFNI headers missing/short/malformed IJK_TO_DICOM; updated to match neuroim2 strict behavior by validating content in AFNIFormat.read_meta_info and adding regression tests. AFNI fixture builders now emit IJK_TO_DICOM by default.

title: Fix DenseNeuroVol.as_mask(indices) Fortran-order indexing
description: Extended ordering fix from as_mask to LogicalNeuroVol(indices) to use Fortran-order flat write path; both now assign via reshape(-1, order='F').

title: Enforce Fortran-order indexing contract for clustered/partition/split_reduce
description: Harden ClusteredNeuroVol constructor: always flatten non-mask-shape cluster inputs with order='F' and map full-mask arrays via mask indices. Added regression test  in tests/test_clustered_neuro_vol.py to prevent hidden row/col order surprises.

title: Fix NeuroSpace.add_dim transform sizing from low dimensions
description: NeuroSpace.add_dim() returns 2x2/3x3 transforms when promoting 1D/2D spaces, incompatible with NeuroSpace.__init__ validation for 2D/3D outputs (expects 4x4). Repro: NeuroSpace((64,32)).add_dim(1,16) raises ValueError; expected 4x4 transform when resulting ndim <=3. Added regression test test_add_dim_low_dim_expands_affine in tests/test_phase1_core.py.
close_reason: Patched NeuroSpace.add_dim to expand to 4x4 for resulting ndim<=3 and added regression test `test_add_dim_low_dim_expands_affine`.

title: Fix NeuroSpace.add_dim affine expansion
description: Added NeuroSpace.add_dim affine-preserving expansion for trans >4D and regression test test_add_dim_from_4d_extends_affine. Pending sync/pull/push protocol check by AGENTS.

title: Respect AFNI IJK_TO_DICOM orientation when building NeuroSpace
description: Input: AFNI IJK_TO_DICOM orientation should determine axes. Bug fixed in _neurospace_from_afni_meta: no hardcoded RAS; when AFNI header has IJK_TO_DICOM content, now convert via AFNI->LPI-like 3x3 path using AXIAL_RAI permutation and nibabel affine_to_axcodes(labels=('R','L'),('A','P'),('S','I')), then find_anatomy_3D. Added regression test in tests/test_afni_io.py with optional IJK_TO_DICOM header field and assertions for read_vol axes.

title: big_neurovecseq uses wrong dimension order (time-first)
description: big_neurovecseq() in src/neuroimpy/big_neuro_vec.py constructs BigNeuroVec with dim=[n_vols]+spatial and fills vec._data[i], producing time-first arrays. This is inconsistent with NeuroVec convention (x,y,z,time). Patch to use dim=spatial+[n_vols], spacing/origin with trailing time entry, allocate vol_shape+(n_vols,), and fill with vec._data[..., i]. Added regression update in tests/test_memory_mapped.py::test_big_neurovecseq expecting shape (10,10,10,3) and data on trailing time axis.
close_reason: Patched big_neurovecseq to append time as last dimension and fill trailing axis; updated test_big_neurovecseq shape assertions from time-first to spatial-first ordering.

title: mapped_neurovecseq imports missing concat symbol
description: `mapped_neurovecseq()` in `src/neuroimpy/mapped_neuro_vec.py` imports `concat` from `neuro_vec`, but no module-level `concat` exists, causing `ImportError` on function call. Replaced with `neurovecseq(vecs)` and added regression in tests/test_memory_mapped.py::test_mapped_neurovecseq confirming mapped output concatenation + mapping.
close_reason: Replaced invalid  import with  in mapped_neurovecseq and added regression test for construction behavior.

title: neurovecseq should propagate label for vector-sequence inputs
description: `neurovecseq` accepts `label` but vector-sequence branch (DenseNeuroVec/SparseNeuroVec list) uses `concat` without applying label, so output drops requested label. Add regression tests for `neurovec(data=[vec1,vec2], label="x")` and `neurovecseq([vec1,vec2], label="x")` expecting `.label=="x"` and patch label propagation.
close_reason: Patched neurovecseq to propagate provided label for DenseNeuroVec/SparseNeuroVec vector-sequence paths and added regression tests in test_neuro_vec_seq.

title: Fix AFNI untilded BYTEORDER_STRING parsing
description: `src/neuroimpy/afni_io.py::_parse_string_attribute` treated only tilde-wrapped values, so bare `BYTEORDER_STRING` values (for example `MSB_FIRST`) were parsed as empty and then defaulted to LSB. Fix now accepts untilded tokens while preserving legacy `~a~` behavior. Added regression test `tests/test_afni_io.py::test_read_meta_info_afni_msb_first_without_tildes` to assert `meta.endian == "big"` for untilded value.

title: read_image with mask should handle multi-file sparse vectors
description: Fixed in code: updated neurovecseq to accept SparseNeuroVec as input and concatenate via sparse concat, preventing TypeError for read_image with multiple files and mask. Added regression test test_multiple_files_vec_with_mask in tests/test_read_image.py.

title: read_image misdispatches singleton 4D volumes as vec
description: Extended parity fix coverage: AFNI and NIfTI singleton-4D now both dispatch through read_image -> read_vol. Changes: src/neuroimpy/io.py computes has_vec_dim as ndim > 3 and any(shape[3:] > 1) for read_image. Added tests in tests/test_read_image.py for both NIfTI and AFNI singleton-4D (test_4d_singleton_time_dimension_returns_vol, test_afni_4d_singleton_time_dimension_returns_vol). This prevents 4D files with only singleton time dimension from incorrectly returning NeuroVec.

title: Add NeuroVol compatibility aliases vol_mean/vol_sd/which_min/which_max
description: Added , , ,  on  in  with compatibility aliases. Added regression tests in  for alias outputs and index correctness (F-order flat argmin/argmax).

title: Python write parity: NIfTI format and data_type defaults/aliases
description: Fixed parity mismatch for write_vol/write_vec in NIfTI alias support: accepted format aliases NIFTI1/NIFTI-1, dtype aliases SHORT/INT plus BINARY/BYTE aliases, and defaulted output to FLOAT for NIfTI when data_type is omitted. Added regression tests in tests/test_io_comprehensive.py for these behaviors. Additional bug found/fixed: default AFNI write path should keep inferred dtype (not force FLOAT), covered by tests/test_afni_io.py test_write_read_vol_afni_defaults_to_compatible_dtype.

title: searchlight uses wrong linear index order and center_index
description: Implemented Fortran-order center indexing and center_index tracking across searchlight/random/bootstrap/coords; searchlight_coords nonzero=False now iterates all voxels; fixed clustered cvol label lookup to use F-order. Added regression tests for these behaviors in tests/test_searchlight.py.

title: Support reverse scalar arithmetic for NeuroVol/NeuroVec
description: Extended fix scope: added reverse arithmetic for NeuroSlice as well (src/neuroimpy/neuro_slice.py) and regression test test_phase4_neuroslice.py::TestNeuroSliceOperations::test_reverse_scalar_arithmetic. Current coverage now includes scalar-on-left operations for Vol, Vec, and Slice.

title: write_vol/write_vec reject unsupported NIfTI data_type
description: Confirmed NIfTI write API mismatch fixed in src/neuroimpy/io.py: data_type for write_vol/write_vec now validated (supports aliases FLOAT/FLOAT32/FLOAT64/DOUBLE, INT*/UINT* supported set) and raises ValueError for unsupported NIfTI data_type. Added regression tests in tests/test_io_comprehensive.py: test_write_vol_rejects_invalid_data_type, test_write_vec_rejects_invalid_data_type, test_write_vec_accepts_float_alias (checks header dtype == float64).

title: match_axis should accept full direction keywords
description: Implemented full-label support in match_axis (LEFT/RIGHT/ANTERIOR/POSTERIOR/INFERIOR/SUPERIOR and spaced/underscored phrases) and added axis-name parity assertions in tests/test_phase1_core.py.

title: read_image parity: type/index behavior and 4D index slicing
description: Continuing parity sweep: completed scalar indices fix in read_vec and no additional changes since this checkpoint.

title: Fix NeuroSpace.add_dim and drop_dim transform preservation
description: Additional confirmed parity bug in NeuroSpace methods: add_dim()/drop_dim() were NameError-prone because axis_set was not imported in neuro_space.py. This breaks both methods when invoked. Patched import in src/neuroimpy/neuro_space.py and added regression assertions in tests/test_phase1_core.py for axis metadata after add_dim/drop_dim.

title: Bug: read_image should support AFNI auto-dispatch
description: read_image in io.py always used nibabel for dispatch, which breaks AFNI (.HEAD/.BRIK) inputs and makes parity with neuroim2::read_image incomplete for list inputs. Fix: detect descriptor and dispatch AFNI via read_vol/read_vec; add tests for AFNI and multi-file list behavior.

title: Preserve NamedAxis direction in axis set transforms
description: Implemented fix and regression tests. axis_set now preserves NamedAxis objects/directions when provided, and flip/permute/drop/add axis helpers now pass NamedAxis lists through instead of rebuilding by names only. Added tests in tests/test_phase1_core.py for flip, permutation, drop, and add direction preservation.
close_reason: Patched axis direction preservation in axis transforms and added regression tests in tests/test_phase1_core.py

title: Run stress/invariant checks and file-based fuzz tests
description: Generate synthetic data inputs and boundary cases for neuroimpy operations; report flaky or deterministic failures for parity mismatches.
notes: Assigned invariant/fuzz-style checks to BlueFalcon in support of parity hunt.

title: Run stress/invariant checks and file-based fuzz tests
description: Generate synthetic data inputs and boundary cases for neuroimpy operations; report flaky or deterministic failures for parity mismatches.

title: Create regression tests for all confirmed parity defects
description: Add deterministic tests for each mismatch found in the parity sweep; include negative and edge-case coverage.
notes: Assigned regression test creation to RedFalcon; drafting initial deterministic parity test modules.

title: Create regression tests for all confirmed parity defects
description: Create regression tests for confirmed parity defects; keep mapping in issue body with IDs and expected parity behavior.

title: API parity scan for neuroim2 behavioral mismatches
description: Find functions with missing args, return-shape, exception differences, and default behavior mismatches.
notes: Assigned parity hunt sweep to BlueFalcon; collecting initial API/behavior mismatches.

title: Fix parity blockers reported by first pass
description: Close any concrete parity failures with targeted patches and add safety tests where behavior diverges.

title: Fix NotImplementedError stubs across codebase
description:
16 NotImplementedError stubs remain:
- big_neuro_vec.py: linear index extraction (2)
- file_backed_neuro_vec.py: linear index extraction, read-only (3)
- neuro_vec.py: bare NotImplementedError line 173, masking line 679 (2)
- neuro_vol.py: SparseNeuroVol complex __setitem__ (1)
- stats.py: split_scale for sparse NeuroVec (1)
- file_format.py: AFNI format support (1)
- io.py: non-NIfTI format read/write (2)
- clustered_neuro_vol.py: arithmetic/comparison ops (2)

title: Remove MappedNeuroHyperVec (no R equivalent)
description: MappedNeuroHyperVec exists in pyneuroim but has no equivalent in neuroim2. Remove from neuro_hypervec.py and __init__.py exports.
close_reason: Removed MappedNeuroHyperVec class from neuro_hypervec.py, factory function, __init__.py exports, and test.

title: Remove LatentNeuroVec (no R equivalent)
description: LatentNeuroVec exists in pyneuroim but has no equivalent in neuroim2. Remove src/pyneuroim/latent_neuro_vec.py, tests/test_latent_neuro_vec.py, and all imports. NOTE: not imported in __init__.py so no export cleanup needed. Files need manual deletion (rm blocked by sandbox).

title: Fix AFNI 4D auto-dispatch in read_image
description: read_image currently relies on meta.dims[3] > 1 for AFNI paths when type='auto'. AFNI headers can encode leading singleton dimensions (e.g., DATASET_DIMENSIONS x y z 1 0), which can bypass vector dispatch and force read_vol; this can fail for AFNI 4D inputs and is untested. Added regression test test_afni_4d_auto_dispatch_returns_vec in tests/test_read_image.py.

title: Support UBYTE data_type alias parity
description: R neuroim2 accepts data_type='UBYTE' for write_vol/write_vec and as_nifti_header (mapped to NIfTI code 2 / uint8). Python now lacked this alias. Fixes applied in src/neuroimpy/io.py (write_vol/write_vec dtype maps), src/neuroimpy/meta_info.py (FileMetaInfo.get_data_dtype), src/neuroimpy/nifti_utils.py (NIFTI_TYPE_CODES). Tests added in tests/test_io_comprehensive.py and tests/test_phase9_file_formats.py.

title: random_searchlight missing parity nonzero argument
description: Updated random_searchlight signature to accept nonzero flag and pass-through to spherical_roi; added regression test ensuring nonzero=False keeps zeros in sampled neighborhood.

title: searchlight nonzero flag is ignored for ROI membership
description: Patched searchlight.py to pass user-provided nonzero to spherical_roi in searchlight_iterator and searchlight_coords; added tests in test_searchlight.py asserting nonzero=False includes zero-valued centers and zero voxels in ROIs.

title: spherical_roi ignores spacing in radius
description: Implemented spacing-aware spherical_roi distance calculation and added regression tests in test_phase5_roi.py and test_searchlight.py verifying anisotropic spacing neighborhoods and searchlight propagation.

title: Add ROI shape factory functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: spherical_roi_set(), cube_roi(), square_roi(), ellipsoid_shape(), cube_shape(), blobby_shape(), patch_set(). These extend the existing spherical_roi/cuboid_roi factories.

title: Add indexing functions (linear_access, matricized_access, from/to_matvec, dot_reduce)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: linear_access() for extraction using linear indices, matricized_access() for time-space index matrix extraction, from_matvec()/to_matvec() for matrix-vector conversions, dot_reduce() for dot product reduction.

title: Add data manipulation functions (concat, scale_series, mapf, downsample)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: concat() for concatenating volumes/vectors in time dimension, scale_series() for per-voxel time-series normalization, mapf() for applying mapping functions, downsample() for reducing spatial resolution.

title: Add graph-based filtering functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: cgb_make_graph(), cgb_filter(), cgb_smooth(), cgb_smooth_loro(), cgb_nuisance(), laplace_enhance(). These provide connectivity-graph-based spatial filtering.

title: Add Source factory classes (NeuroVolSource, NeuroVecSource, etc.)
description: R neuroim2 has a Source pattern for lazy object construction from files: NeuroVolSource, NeuroVecSource, SparseNeuroVecSource, MappedNeuroVecSource. These extend FileSource and allow deferred loading.

title: Add ClusteredNeuroVec class
description: R neuroim2 has ClusteredNeuroVec: 4D data with cluster assignments and shared time-series per cluster. Slots: cvol (ClusteredNeuroVol), ts (matrix), cl_map (int), label.

title: Add NeuroBucket class
description: R neuroim2 has NeuroBucket: a sequence of labeled NeuroVol objects forming a named 4D representation. Needs slots: labels (list[str]), data (list[NeuroVol]).

title: Add read_image() dispatch and load_data() generic
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: read_image() auto-dispatches to read_vol or read_vec based on file dimensions. load_data() is a generic loader from Source objects.

title: Add simulation and analysis utilities
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: simulate_fmri() for generating synthetic fMRI data, prepare_confounds() for confound variable preparation, make_time_weights() for time-based weights.

title: Add visualization functions (plot_ortho, plot_montage, plot_overlay, color mapping)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: plot_ortho() for orthogonal 3-plane view, plot_montage() for slice montages, plot_overlay() for image overlays, mapToColors(), resolve_cmap(), plus matplotlib equivalents of scale_fill_neuro()/theme_neuro().

title: Add searchlight variants (resampled_searchlight, cluster_searchlight_series)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: resampled_searchlight() and cluster_searchlight_series(). These are specialized searchlight analysis variants.

title: Add NIfTI extension support
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: NiftiExtension, NiftiExtensionList, NiftiExtensionCodes classes, plus parse_extension(), parse_afni_extension(), get_afni_attribute(), list_afni_attributes() functions.

title: Add IndexLookupVol class
description: R neuroim2 has IndexLookupVol: maps 1D grid indices to sparse table indices. Slots: space, indices, map. Used internally for sparse representations.

title: Add ROIVecWindow class
description: R neuroim2 has ROIVecWindow: windowed ROI vector similar to ROIVolWindow but for 4D data. Additional slots: parent_index, center_index.
